trajectory.reasoning:
WHAT YOU FOUND: The Comments History section contains no customer comments, staff notes, refund requests, RMA numbers, or policy references. Order facts show the item was fully shipped (Qty Shipped: 1), fully paid (Total Paid: $99.56), and the order status is Complete with Total Refunded: $0.00.
WHERE YOU FOUND IT: Order #000000805 → Comments History section (/admin/sales/order/view/order_id/805/#comments_history) and Order Totals / Items Ordered sections on the same order page.
WHY IT MATTERS: The critical protocol requires citing specific numbers or facts from Comments History or Staff Notes. Since there are no notes supporting a refund (no defect, return authorization, delivery issue, or policy exception), and the order is complete and shipped with no prior refund activity, there is no documented basis to approve a refund. The request lacks justification beyond 'I want a refund.'
